summary: Completed comprehensive testing of AdVantage Studio - Ad Preview & Visualization Dashboard. All backend APIs and frontend functionality working perfectly.
passed_tests: Backend API health check at /api/ returns 200 with correct message
File upload endpoint POST /api/upload successfully uploads test image file
File serve endpoint GET /api/files/{path} returns uploaded files correctly
Media list endpoint GET /api/media returns list of uploaded files
Media delete endpoint DELETE /api/media/{file_id} successfully removes files
Dashboard page loads with sidebar and preview canvas visible
All 9 platform tabs are visible and clickable: Facebook, Instagram, X/Twitter, LinkedIn, TikTok, YouTube, Pinterest, Snapchat, Google Ads
Platform tab switching works correctly - previews update for each platform
Mobile/Desktop device toggle switches preview mode correctly (phone frame vs browser frame)
Form inputs (Brand Name, Handle, Caption, Headline, Description, CTA Link) update live in preview
CTA dropdown select works with all options (tested 'Learn More' selection)
All platform previews render correctly in both mobile and desktop modes
Export dropdown with PNG and PDF options is clickable and functional
Media upload drag & drop zone is visible with correct text and file type indicators
File input accepts image/* and video/* files as expected
Live preview updates work seamlessly across all form fields
